name: CSS-class toggle on hero region
notes: Toggle a class + add an inline style on an element with static class/style in the template. Empirical observation: SURVIVES without reinforcement — Vue's hydration treats the class list and style attribute as static-template values when no reactive binding exists. The guidance's 'CSS-driven visibility changes' line is corroborated, and the empirical scope is broader: any non-reactive class edit is edge-safe.
